# **\[RAW INPUT — DO NOT EDIT\]**

# **Terracart support ticket sample**

# **Pulled by: Lena Torres (Head of Support)**

# **Period: Last 60 days**

# **Total tickets in "checkout / order not received" category: 214**

# **This file: representative sample of 20 tickets (anonymized)**

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4401**

**Subject:** Did my order go through?? **Channel:** Email **Status at resolution:** Order confirmed, shipped day 3 **Resolution time:** 2.5 days

I placed an order about an hour ago for a hiking pack. I filled everything in, hit submit, and then I got a white screen. No confirmation page. I've checked my email three times and there's nothing. Did it go through? I'm scared to order again in case I get double charged. Please help.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4388**

**Subject:** Charged twice **Channel:** Phone **Status at resolution:** One charge reversed (duplicate order placed by customer) **Resolution time:** 4 days (required coordination with payment processor)

I tried to buy trekking poles yesterday. My card was charged but I didn't get a confirmation so I ordered again this morning. Now I see two charges on my card. I need a refund for one of them. This is incredibly frustrating.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4372**

**Subject:** Payment not going through on iPhone **Channel:** Chat **Status at resolution:** Customer completed order on desktop **Resolution time:** 18 minutes

I keep trying to enter my payment details on my phone but I can't see where to type the expiration date. The keyboard is in the way. Is there a phone number I can call to place the order?

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4361**

**Subject:** Error message after entering card info **Channel:** Email **Status at resolution:** Customer never re-attempted (churned) **Resolution time:** N/A — customer did not respond to follow-up

I got an error that said "Transaction could not be completed. Please try again." but I don't know if my card was charged or not. I have a $189 pending charge on my account. Please tell me what's going on. This is very stressful.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4355**

**Subject:** Where is my confirmation email? **Channel:** Chat **Status at resolution:** Order confirmed, email resent manually **Resolution time:** 22 minutes

I ordered two days ago and haven't received any confirmation. My order number is TRR-29401. Can you confirm it went through? I'm leaving for a camping trip on Friday and need to know if I should find another option.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4341**

**Subject:** SCAM?? No confirmation, card charged **Channel:** Email **Status at resolution:** Order confirmed, customer reassured, left positive review after receiving item **Resolution time:** 1 day

I'm extremely upset. I placed a $267 order and my card was charged but I received NO confirmation email and NO order confirmation page. I have reported this to my credit card company. If this is a scam operation you should be ashamed. I am going to warn everyone I know.

*Agent note: Customer was very hostile initially. Once order was confirmed and tracking provided, she became apologetic and thankful. Left a 5-star review when item arrived. But the initial experience clearly could have lost this customer permanently.*

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4329**

**Subject:** Checkout froze on my phone **Channel:** Chat **Status at resolution:** Workaround provided (desktop checkout) **Resolution time:** 31 minutes

Hi I'm trying to check out on my Samsung Galaxy and after I enter my credit card the page just kind of freezes? The spinner spins and then nothing happens. I've tried three times.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4318**

**Subject:** I can't finish my order **Channel:** Email **Status at resolution:** Customer completed order after email support walkthrough **Resolution time:** 6 hours (async email thread)

Hello, I am trying to complete my purchase but the checkout page is confusing me. I filled in my card number but I can't find where to put the security code. When I scroll down I see a "CVV" field but I'm not sure if that's the same thing. Also it says my card was declined but I have money in my account. Is there a different way to pay?

*Agent note: CVV confusion is a recurring issue. We've seen \~15 tickets this period where customers don't know what CVV means. The field label alone (just "CVV") is not sufficient for less tech-savvy customers.*

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4307**

**Subject:** Order confirmation — still waiting **Channel:** Email **Status at resolution:** Order confirmed (email failure confirmed on our end) **Resolution time:** 3 days

I placed my order on Thursday. It is now Sunday and I have received nothing. I've checked spam. I am a longtime customer and this has never happened before. I am concerned.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4291**

**Subject:** Double charge?? **Channel:** Phone **Status at resolution:** One refund processed **Resolution time:** 5 days

I was charged twice for the same order. First time I got an error message so I thought it didn't go through. Second time it said it went through but I still didn't get a confirmation email. Now I'm looking at two charges. Please call me back.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4285**

**Subject:** Mobile checkout not working **Channel:** Chat **Status at resolution:** Customer abandoned, unknown if they repurchased **Resolution time:** 14 minutes (chat abandoned by customer mid-session)

The keyboard keeps covering the form on my iPhone. I can't see what I'm typing. I've been trying for 20 minutes.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4271**

**Subject:** Is my credit card info safe? **Channel:** Email **Status at resolution:** Reassurance provided, order confirmed **Resolution time:** 1 day

I entered all my payment info and then got an error and a white screen. I'm worried about where my credit card information went. Can you confirm it's not stored anywhere it shouldn't be? I also want to know if my order was placed.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4260**

**Subject:** Confirmation email sent to wrong address? **Channel:** Chat **Status at resolution:** Order confirmed, email address on file was correct (email delivery failure on our end) **Resolution time:** 25 minutes

I placed an order and the checkout confirmed my email address as \[correct email\] but I never received anything. Have tried support@, sales@, check spam — nothing.

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4247**

**Subject:** Checkout error, need help fast **Channel:** Phone **Status at resolution:** Order replicated manually by agent **Resolution time:** 42 minutes

Called in, very distressed. Was trying to buy a gift for her husband's birthday (tomorrow). Checkout kept throwing an error. Agent placed the order manually over the phone after collecting payment info. Expedited shipping comped by support manager.

*Agent note: This is the third time this month I've placed an order manually for a customer who couldn't complete checkout. We're doing PM's job because the checkout is broken. No shade — but someone should know this is happening.*

---

## **Ticket \#TRR-4231**

**Subject:** Wrong item — but also never got confirmation **Channel:** Email **Status at resolution:** Wrong item confirmed (separate fulfillment error), confirmation failure also confirmed **Resolution time:** 7 days

Two problems: 1\) I never got a confirmation email so I wasn't even sure my order went through. 2\) When the package arrived it was the wrong color. I ordered forest green, I got khaki. Please help.

---

## **Aggregate notes from Lena (Head of Support)**

**Volume:** 214 tickets in 60 days in the checkout/order category. That's 3.5 tickets per day. Each ticket averages 28 minutes of agent time.

**Breakdown:**

* 167 tickets (78%): Order processed, confirmation email failed silently  
* 47 tickets (22%): Genuine order failure (card declined with bad error UX, mobile form failure, etc.)

**Double-order refunds:** 23 confirmed in Q2, totaling $4,100 in refunded revenue \+ processing fees

**Agent capacity impact:** 214 tickets × 28 min avg \= \~100 hours of agent time in 60 days that is directly attributable to checkout failures. That's more than 2 full work weeks of one agent's time.

**The thing nobody's talking about:** For every customer who contacts support, there are probably 5–10 who don't. They just leave. Or they tell their friends. Or they dispute the charge. We're only seeing the customers who are motivated enough to reach out.

**Lena's bottom line:** Fix the confirmation email first. Everything else, I can manage. The confirmation failure is making every other problem 10x worse because customers can't tell if their order exists.
